nasb.text: “Because he has loved Me, therefore I will deliver him; I will set him securely on high, because he has known My name.

esv.text: “Because he holds fast to me in love, I will deliver him; I will protect him, because he knows my name.

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“因為他戀慕我，我必搭救他； 因為他認識我的名，我必保護他。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“因为他爱我，我必拯救他； 因为他信靠我的名， 我必保护他。

csbs.text: “因为他爱慕我，我就挽救他； 因为他认识我的名，我就高举他。
